provenance: All values pulled from Phase-2 deliverable artifacts (not memory). Two internally-consistent Norman number sets exist and are kept separate: (A) flagship emergence_certificate.csv (fbfc2cf0) — the canonical Norman headline; (B) cross-screen recompute (norman_metrics.json d2533e54) using a symmetric cone at a slightly different threshold — used ONLY for the Norman-vs-CaRPool transfer comparison so both screens share one pipeline.

emergence_certificate_flagship.borderline_note: BCL2L11+BAK1 z=2.9 p=0.005 passes bar-a but is modest; KIF18B+KIF2C z=1.6 p=0.055 is the only NS headliner.
emergence_certificate_flagship.synergy_partial_method: textbook three-correlation partial Spearman on rank-transformed variables (residual, non-additivity, effect magnitude): rho_ab.c = (r_ab - r_ac*r_bc)/sqrt((1-r_ac^2)(1-r_bc^2)) = 0.6244 -> 0.62. A non-standard double-rank variant used in an earlier keystone draft gave 0.60; the manuscript and Fig2 now use the standard estimator (0.62).

kway.real_reachable_from_lower_order: 40->16 certified (60% shrink); 24 flip emergent->reachable; all 131 stay geometrically outside both cones
kway.synth_note: SYNTHETIC planted-epistasis screen — Norman measures 0 triples; validates the order-3 code path, NOT real 3-way biology.

cross_screen_transfer.verdict: Certificate + SNR/magnitude confound + noise-aware fix all transfer; the raw-label triage rank transfers (~2.2x both); the magnitude-controlled triage component is screen-specific (survives Norman, n.s. in CaRPool).
